payload.title: Migrate primary database from PostgreSQL to PlanetScale
payload.statement: We migrate to PlanetScale (MySQL-compatible) for horizontal scalability and branching workflows.
payload.context: Traffic growth has exceeded what a single PostgreSQL instance can handle cost-effectively.
payload.consequences: ADR-001 is superseded. All services must migrate to MySQL-compatible drivers. ADR-002 (session auth) must be revisited.
